verification_ips.name: ADC Linearity VIP
verification_ips.description: Validates ADC linearity through INL/DNL computation and code transition analysis.

verification_ips.name: ADC Transient VIP
verification_ips.description: Validates converter activity over a sampled-data transient window.

verification_ips.name: Analog Snapshot VIP
verification_ips.description: Turns a block verification spec into a normalized regression artifact.

verification_ips.name: Bluetooth Low Energy VIP
verification_ips.description: Validates BLE radio operation, advertising, connection, and security procedures.

verification_ips.name: Battery Management System VIP
verification_ips.description: Validates battery management including cell monitoring, protection thresholds, and fault handling.

verification_ips.name: CAN Verification IP
verification_ips.description: Validates CAN 2.0 protocol compliance, messaging, and bus arbitration.

verification_ips.name: CANopen VIP
verification_ips.description: Validates CANopen protocol stack including object dictionary access, state management, signal integrity, and automotive-grade timing compliance.
design_scenarios: SDO download with segmented transfer (16-byte chunks) and abort sequence
PDO event-triggered transmission with 1ms time window
NMT master commanding all nodes to START with 10ms guard time
Heartbeat timeout simulation with node recovery
EMCY message priority transmission over normal PDO traffic
SYNC frame with synchronized PDO response within 10µs window
Arbitration with 11-bit identifier collision and priority resolution
Bus-off error state recovery after 128 error frames
Multi-node heartbeat network with 8 nodes at 100ms intervals

verification_ips.name: Clock Gating VIP
checks: gating latency from enable to clock shutdown (<2ns typ)
enable signal synchronization to clock edge
setup/hold time verification at gating point
power gating interaction with clock gating
verification_ips.description: Validates clock gating cells for correct enable timing, glitch-free operation, and critical path implications in low-power designs.
design_scenarios: enable signal held high for exactly 1 clock cycle (glitch detection window)
enable to disable transition with <1ns setup margin (CDC testing)
cascaded gating stages (4-level hierarchy) with accumulated delay analysis
enable signal metastability injection at clock edge boundaries
power-gated domain with clock gating held inactive during power-down
mixed rising-edge and falling-edge enable detection robustness
cross-domain clock gating with 100ns clock skew between domains
duty cycle measurement over 1M cycles (verify no asymmetry growth)
enhanced_scenarios: CDC (clock domain crossing) timing margin verification
enable metastability injection at clock edges

verification_ips.name: Clock Monitoring VIP
verification_ips.description: Monitors oscillator and clock divider performance across corners.

verification_ips.name: Cryptographic Accelerator VIP
verification_ips.description: Validates cryptographic operation correctness and timing consistency for security applications.

verification_ips.name: Current Consumption VIP
verification_ips.description: Measures steady-state and transient current consumption across all rails.

verification_ips.name: Digital Subsystem VIP
verification_ips.description: Validates digital logic timing, sequencing, and functional behavior.

verification_ips.name: EMC Compliance VIP
verification_ips.description: Validates electromagnetic compatibility for automotive and industrial environments.

verification_ips.name: Ethernet VIP
checks: frame format validation (destination, source, type, data, FCS)
transmit/receive signal integrity at PHY interface
verification_ips.description: Validates Ethernet PHY compliance with IEEE 802.3 standards including signal integrity, protocol timing, and mixed-signal interface characterization.
design_scenarios: back-to-back frame transmission (minimum IFG)
collision detection and exponential backoff
auto-negotiation sequence with link-up
long frame (1518-byte) transmission and FCS validation
FCS error injection at specific bit positions
MDI eye diagram analysis (1M UI samples)
receive jitter transfer characterization
Manchester decoder synchronization
CRC polynomial test vector validation
carrier sense and idle bus detection
enhanced_scenarios: long frame (1518-byte) transmission and FCS validation
FCS error injection at specific bit positions
MDI eye diagram analysis (1M UI samples)
carrier sense and idle bus detection

verification_ips.name: Frequency Accuracy VIP
verification_ips.description: Validates oscillator frequency accuracy across corners and operating conditions.

verification_ips.name: High-Speed Signal VIP
verification_ips.description: Validates high-speed signal integrity including timing margins and electromagnetic effects.
design_scenarios: differential signal eye diagram with jitter histogram (1M UI samples)
simultaneous switching noise (SSN) injection on adjacent signal groups
impedance mismatch (10% over/under nominal) reflection analysis
long trace (10cm) with controlled dv/dt slew rate variations
frequency content analysis at Nyquist and harmonics (20 GHz sampling)
temperature and supply voltage sensitivity of propagation delay
crosstalk from aggressor signals with 2V/ns transitions
overshoot/undershoot measurement at 3x Vdd and -0.3V boundaries
enhanced_scenarios: differential eye diagram with jitter histogram
long trace propagation (10cm) with slew variations
frequency content at Nyquist and harmonics
PWM jitter tolerance at high frequencies

verification_ips.name: LIN Verification IP

verification_ips.name: NFC Verification IP

verification_ips.name: Noise Performance VIP

verification_ips.name: Power Domain Isolation VIP

verification_ips.name: Power Sequence VIP
verification_ips.description: Checks rail bring-up order and control-logic sequencing assumptions.

verification_ips.name: Power Supply VIP
verification_ips.description: Measures power supply quality metrics including ripple, PSRR, and regulation performance.

verification_ips.name: Precision DAC VIP
verification_ips.description: Validates precision DAC linearity, settling behavior, and output accuracy across codes.
design_scenarios: full-scale sweepfrom 0x000 to 0xFFF with INL/DNL extraction
single code transition (e.g., 0x7FF to 0x800) with glitch measurement
settling time to 0.1% and 0.01% at different reference voltages
monotonicity verification under PVT corners (slow/fast silicon)
output impedance measurement and load transient response
power-supply rejection ratio (PSRR) at 1kHz line ripple injection
temperature drift characterization (-40°C to +125°C)
code-dependent noise and spectral analysis across frequency bands
enhanced_scenarios: single code transitions with glitch measurement

verification_ips.name: PROFIBUS VIP
checks: bit timing and baud rate accuracy (9.6 kbps - 12 Mbps)
frame format (start, address, data length, data, CRC, end)
idle line detection and silence detection
power consumption in different operational modes
verification_ips.description: Validates PROFIBUS transceiver protocol compliance for industrial fieldbus networks including timing, signal integrity, EMI/EMC, and mixed-signal biasing.
design_scenarios: token passing at high speed (12 Mbps) with low latency
simultaneous transmission collision detection and resolution
idleline timeout and watchdog expiration recovery
frame transmission with CRC error injection at various bit positions
failsafe idle state with resistor biasing (bus pulled to mid-level)
noise margin validation with 50% amplitude reduction
long message (64 bytes) transmission with fragmentation
multi-slave arbitration with priority resolution
enhanced_scenarios: token passing at 12Mbps with latency verification
frame CRC error injection at multiple bit positions
failsafe idle state with biasing validation

verification_ips.name: SPI Verification IP
verification_ips.description: Exercises the serial programming path and register map visibility.

digital_subsystems.name: Analog Conditioning Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Multi-channel analog signal conditioning with programmable gain, filtering, and thresholding.

digital_subsystems.name: Battery Management Subsystem
digital_subsystems.description: Complete battery pack monitoring and management with multi-cell balancing and safety enforcement.

digital_subsystems.name: CAN Node Control Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Automotive CAN node with messaging, configuration, and interrupt handling.

digital_subsystems.name: Clock Distribution Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Advanced clock generation, distribution, and gating for power-efficient multi-domain designs.

digital_subsystems.name: Clock Gating Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Integrated clock gating and domain control for multi-frequency clock generation, distribution, and energy-efficient gating. Includes glitch-free enable logic, setup/hold verification, and multi-level gating cascade support. Integration rules: clock gates must preserve duty cycle, enable signals require CDC (clock domain crossing) synchronization, output clock must not exceed input frequency.
integration_rules: enable signals synchronized to clock rising edge (<1ns setup margin)
clock gate outputs capped at input frequency
CDC synchronizers for cross-domain enable signals
gated clock <50ps skew to non-gated reference
per-domain isolated gating logic for multi-frequency
validation_scenarios: Simultaneous enabling of 4 gating stages with timing closure verification
Enable signal metastability injection at CDC boundaries
Clock tree analysis with gate insertion delay impact
Duty cycle preservation over 10M clock cycles

digital_subsystems.name: Converter Control Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Digital control subsystem for sampling cadence, trim, and observability.

digital_subsystems.name: Ethernet Control Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Complete Ethernet PHY control and management interface subsystem for networked applications. Features real-time frame processing, link status monitoring, MDI transceiver control, and multi-protocol configuration through UART/SPI. Integration rules: Ethernet PHY must provide differential signaling (LVDS), RX/TX data path must meet 10/100 Mbps timing, CRC validation must be hardware-accelerated.
integration_rules: IEEE 802.3 timing margins (30% eye opening minimum)
hardware CRC validation (1 frame time reporting)
validation_scenarios: Back-to-back frame reception at 100 Mbps with CRC validation
Auto-negotiation with link-up confirmation in <2 seconds
Register access via UART/SPI during active frame transmission
Collision scenario with exponential backoff timing verification

digital_subsystems.name: Frequency Monitoring Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Dedicated frequency monitoring and fault detection subsystem for oscillator health.

digital_subsystems.name: I2C Sensor Interface
digital_subsystems.description: I2C master/slave subsystem for multi-sensor coordination and data aggregation.

digital_subsystems.name: Infotainment Control Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Multimedia and human-machine interface subsystem with I2S audio, I2C, and UART support for in-vehicle infotainment systems. Handles stereo audio streaming, multi-node I2C sensor aggregation, and serial console access. Integration rules: I2S timing must align frame sync with data, I2C bus requires open-drain arbitration (not push-pull), UART baud rate generator must support automotive standard rates (9.6k, 115.2k, 1M baud).
integration_rules: I2S frame sync timing (±10ns to data bit 0)
I2S bit clock BCLK synchronization (within 1 period)
I2C open-drain drivers (no active high push-pull)
I2C SDA release timing (<5µs after SCL low)
UART FIFO water levels for DMA scheduling
validation_scenarios: Stereo I2S audio streaming with sample rate changes (48kHz to 192kHz)
Multi-slave I2C bus arbitration and clock stretching timeout
UART at 1M baud with back-to-back character transmission
I2S LRCLK timing with ±10ns margin to SDATA transitions

digital_subsystems.name: IoT Wireless Communication Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Integrated wireless subsystem for multi-protocol IoT connectivity (BLE, NFC, custom RF).

digital_subsystems.name: LIN Node Control Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Integrated digital subsystem for protocol control, configuration, and sequencing.

digital_subsystems.name: Multi-Rail Power Control Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Advanced multi-rail power sequencing with rail-order enforcement and cross-domain isolation.

digital_subsystems.name: Power Conversion Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Integrated power conversion control plane for multi-output PMIC and power management.
integration_rules: buck/boost frequency phase alignment for EMI control
loop bandwidth 10x separation from switching frequency
current sensing accuracy (<5%) for cycle-by-cycle limiting
output voltage ordering enforcement (core before I/O)
validation_scenarios: Multi-output transient response with simultaneous load steps on different rails
Frequency detector alarm triggering at 90% and 110% of nominal frequency
Current limiting activation at 120% nominal load with current sense margin
Soft-start ramp with controlled dV/dt <1V/ms

digital_subsystems.name: Power Sequencer
digital_subsystems.description: Multi-rail power sequencing with enable staging and monitoring.

digital_subsystems.name: PWM Motor Control Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Coordinated PWM generation with dead-time insertion and fault protection for motor drive.

digital_subsystems.name: RS-485 Interface Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Integrated RS-485 bus interface with UART-based protocol and fault detection.

digital_subsystems.name: Safety Monitor Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Safety-critical monitoring subsystem with watchdog, temperature, and system reset coordination for functional safety (ISO 26262) compliance. Provides periodic health checks, autonomous reset generation on fault, and interrupt-based alert mechanisms. Integration rules: watchdog timeout must be verified independent of system clock, temperature thresholds require hysteresis to prevent chatter, reset assertion must be asynchronous and synchronized with safety domains.
integration_rules: watchdog kick monitoring (2 consecutive miss triggers reset)
shutdown persistence during main logic hang
safety signal replication/voting for SIL-2 compliance
reset timing per power-on reset requirements
shutdown latch-up until power cycle or firmware reset
validation_scenarios: Watchdog timeout with clock glitch injection (verify independent timing verification)
Temperature threshold crossing with ±10°C overshoot and hysteresis response
Simultaneous watchdog timeout and over-temperature event prioritization
Reset signal persistence during main clock stoppage

digital_subsystems.name: Security and Cryptography Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Integrated cryptographic acceleration and random number generation for secure communications.

digital_subsystems.name: Sensor Aggregation Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Multi-protocol sensor interface plane for coordinating I2C and SPI peripherals.

digital_subsystems.name: Sensor Hub Control Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Shared digital control and telemetry plane for mixed-signal sensor chips.

digital_subsystems.name: Test and Debug Control Plane
digital_subsystems.description: JTAG, test-point aggregation, and debug signal routing for production test.

digital_subsystems.name: Thermal Management Plane
digital_subsystems.description: Temperature monitoring and thermal shutdown sequencing with interrupt integration.

digital_subsystems.name: Trim Engine Subsystem
digital_subsystems.description: Programmable analog parameter tuning with NVM storage for post-silicon calibration.

digital_subsystems.name: UART Debug Interface
digital_subsystems.description: Serial debug and telemetry port for system diagnostics and characterization.

chip_profiles.name: Analog Signal Conditioner
chip_profiles.summary: Mixed-signal front-end combining precision references, filters, multiplexers, and ADCs.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable analog front-end macro for precision measurement and signal conditioning.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles precision analog infrastructure—references, op-amps, filters, multiplexers, and ADCs—for sensor signal conditioning in measurement and industrial applications.

chip_profiles.name: Audio Codec ASIC
chip_profiles.summary: Digital audio interface chip combining stereo ADC/DAC, I2S, and signal conditioning.
chip_profiles.headline: Integrated audio codec platform with I2S interface and precision analog front-end.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles a complete audio-in/audio-out codec chip from precision analog infrastructure (references, op-amps, filters, ADC/DAC) and digital I2S interface for consumer and automotive audio applications.

chip_profiles.name: Automotive HV/DC PMIC
chip_profiles.summary: Automotive multi-output PMIC with boost converter, buck converter, and integrated protection.
chip_profiles.headline: High-integration automotive power management IC for battery-powered systems with multiple rail generation.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile combines boost, buck, and LDO converters with multi-rail sequencing, frequency monitoring, and thermal protection for demanding automotive power-distribution applications.
chip_profiles.standard: ISO 26262 ASIL-B, ISO 7637 transient immunity, AEC-Q200

chip_profiles.name: Automotive Infotainment SoC
chip_profiles.summary: Advanced in-vehicle infotainment system with multi-protocol connectivity, audio interface, and safety monitoring.
chip_profiles.headline: Integrated automotive SoC for multimedia and telematics with safety-critical features.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile creates a complete automotive infotainment chip combining I2S audio interfaces, multi-protocol connectivity (CAN, Ethernet), safety monitoring, and robust power management for in-vehicle entertainment and navigation systems. Reference design includes full schematic, layout floorplan with power distribution, thermal simulation model, and AUTOSAR software scaffolding.
design_collateral: full schematic with power distribution network
layout floorplan (500mm²) with thermal analysis
thermal simulation model and hotspot analysis
AUTOSAR 4.4 software scaffolding
functional safety evidence package (FMEA, safety case)
integration test plan (CAN/Ethernet protocol coverage)
I2S audio streaming support (48kHz/16-bit stereo with DMA)
CAN message filtering and priority arbitration logic
Ethernet frame buffering with IEEE 802.1Q VLAN support
automation_coverage: mixed-signal regression with I2S (1M samples) + CAN (100 msg/sec)
multi-rail sequencing with transient load steps
conducted/radiated emissions from PWM and Ethernet

chip_profiles.name: CAN Automotive Node
chip_profiles.summary: CAN-enabled automotive controller with transceiver, messaging, and thermal protection.
chip_profiles.headline: Integrated CAN node assembly with automotive-grade reliability and multi-protocol support.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile combines CAN transceiver and controller with thermal monitoring, watchdog, and multi-channel analog monitoring for robust automotive embedded applications.

chip_profiles.name: Debug Console Interface
chip_profiles.summary: UART-based debug and telemetry interface with register access and event logging.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable debug interface combining UART, SPI, and control plane for system diagnostics.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile provides a minimal but functional debug and telemetry framework combining serial and parallel register-access methods for lab characterization and field diagnostics.

chip_profiles.name: Ethernet Sensor Hub
chip_profiles.summary: Networked sensor aggregation node with Ethernet PHY, multi-channel I2C/SPI, and precision analog.
chip_profiles.headline: Industrial sensor hub with Ethernet connectivity for distributed measurement systems.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles a complete sensor aggregation and networking device combining Ethernet connectivity, multi-protocol sensor interfaces (I2C, SPI), precision analog front-ends, and data buffering for industrial process monitoring and control. Reference implementation includes calibration framework, timestamp synchronization with IEEE 1588 PTP, and deterministic packet scheduling for time-critical measurements.
design_collateral: sensor hub reference platform with sensor array
IEEE 1588 PTP implementation for time synchronization
multi-channel sensor input conditioning
deterministic Ethernet packet scheduling
calibration framework with EEPROM storage
integration examples for common industrial sensors
timestamp injection into Ethernet frames
multi-channel ADC synchronized sampling

chip_profiles.name: High-Voltage Power Supply
chip_profiles.summary: Automotive high-voltage supply combining buck converter, LDO, charge pump, and protection.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable high-voltage PMIC assembly for automotive battery-powered systems.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile starts a high-voltage PMIC from buck, charge pump, and multi-rail LDO infrastructure for automotive battery-connected applications with integrated power sequencing.
chip_profiles.standard: ISO 7637 transient immunity, internal PMIC spec

chip_profiles.name: Industrial IoT Gateway
chip_profiles.summary: Multi-protocol industrial gateway with PROFIBUS, CANopen, Ethernet, and security acceleration.
chip_profiles.headline: Comprehensive industrial edge node for protocol translation and secure data aggregation.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles a complete industrial IoT gateway from multiple protocol interfaces (PROFIBUS, CANopen, Ethernet), cryptographic security acceleration, and robust power management for distributed industrial control and data collection. Includes reference integration with protocol stacks, DMA-based packet handling, and ECC error correction for memory-critical data paths.
design_collateral: gateway architecture with protocol routing
multi-protocol packet router with DMA support
security accelerator integration examples
industrial protocol stacks (PROFIBUS, CANopen, EtherCAT)
DMA controller design for >100Mbps throughput
field calibration procedures and sensor integration guide
redundant Ethernet failover logic (<50ms switchover)
CRC polynomial validation for all protocols
automation_coverage: long-duration stress tests (168 hours) with 0.1-1% packet loss
packet buffer sizing for 100Mbps sustained throughput

chip_profiles.name: IoT Edge Hub
chip_profiles.summary: Multi-protocol IoT edge node combining BLE, NFC, security, and sensor aggregation.
chip_profiles.headline: Advanced IoT gateway with wireless connectivity, cryptographic security, and sensor hub integration.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles a complete IoT edge hub from wireless transceivers (BLE, NFC, RF front-end), cryptographic accelerators, sensor interfaces, and battery management for battery-powered edge AI and data collection.
chip_profiles.standard: BLE 5.0, MIPI I3C, ISO 26262 ASIL-B capable, Qi-enabled

chip_profiles.name: Isolated Power Supply Controller
chip_profiles.summary: Isolated PMIC with multiple isolated rails, boost/buck converters, and high-side gate drivers.
chip_profiles.headline: Industrial-grade multi-isolated power management IC for modular and resilient systems.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile creates a comprehensive isolated power controller combining multiple LDO rails with galvanic isolation, boost/buck conversion, high-side gate drivers, and power sequencing for industrial equipment requiring multiple isolated supplies. Design collateral includes fault protection logic, isolated measurement circuits, and automated burn-in test patterns.
design_collateral: isolation barrier schematic with creepage rules
multi-isolated rail power tree with load sequencing
galvanic isolation measurement circuits
automated burn-in test patterns and sequences
safety FMEA with isolation failure modes
layout guidelines for isolated domains with EMI isolation
isolation barrier self-test with leakage monitoring
cross-domain handshake synchronization logic
automation_coverage: multi-isolated rail bring-up with cross-domain timing
isolation fault injection and detection (>99% confidence)

chip_profiles.name: Isolated RS-485 Gateway
chip_profiles.summary: Galvanically isolated RS-485 interface combining transceiver, isolation, and protocol handling.
chip_profiles.headline: Isolated industrial communication gateway for multi-node networks and power-isolated systems.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile combines RS-485 transceiver with integrated isolation barrier and protocol handling for robust industrial communication networks with ground potential differences.

chip_profiles.name: LIN Node ASIC
chip_profiles.summary: Automotive LIN node with integrated analog rails, transceiver, and digital control plane.
chip_profiles.headline: Integrated LIN chip assembly from reusable power, interface, and digital IP.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile combines the reusable bandgap, regulator, LIN interface, and control-plane IP blocks into an automotive-oriented mixed-signal chip scaffold.

chip_profiles.name: Mixed-Signal Sensor Hub
chip_profiles.summary: Sensor/control chip scaffold combining references, rails, multiple converter macros, and shared digital control.
chip_profiles.headline: Sensor-hub chip assembly from reusable analog, converter, and digital subsystem IP.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile combines power/reference infrastructure with multiple converter macros and a shared digital control plane so new monitor or sensor chips start from integrated building blocks instead of a blank architecture.
chip_profiles.standard: Internal sensor and monitor architecture reference

chip_profiles.name: Multi-Sensor Hub
chip_profiles.summary: I2C-based sensor aggregation platform with dual data converters and temperature monitoring.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable multi-sensor platform combining I2C interface, analog monitoring, and temperature protection.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile builds a sensor aggregation chip from reusable I2C controller, dual ADC macros, thermal monitoring, and analog signal conditioning IPs.

chip_profiles.name: Power Management Unit
chip_profiles.summary: PMU-oriented chip scaffold combining references, regulators, switching conversion, and control-plane logic.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable PMU chip assembly with analog power IP and digital control integration.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile starts a power-management chip from reusable bandgap, regulator, switching, and digital-control assets already in the repository.

chip_profiles.name: Precision Analog Front-End
chip_profiles.summary: Lab instrumentation front-end with programmable gain, multi-threshold detection, and precision references.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable precision analog interface for measurement equipment and laboratory instrumentation.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile builds a precision analog front-end from programmable gain amplifiers, multi-threshold comparator arrays, and precision reference generators for multi-channel instrumentation.

chip_profiles.name: Real-Time Motor Controller
chip_profiles.summary: Three-phase motor control ASIC with PWM generation, current sensing, and thermal protection.
chip_profiles.headline: Integrated motor control platform for robotics, industrial drives, and automotive applications.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles a complete motor controller from PWM generation, programmable gain amplifiers for current sensing, thermal monitoring, and digital control plane for commutation sequencing.
chip_profiles.standard: IEC 61800-5 suitability, internal motor-control architecture reference

chip_profiles.name: Safe Motor Drive Controller
chip_profiles.summary: Functional safety-compliant three-phase motor drive with integrated diagnostics and SIL monitoring.
chip_profiles.headline: ISO 13849 SIL-2 capable motor drive ASIC for safety-critical industrial applications.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile creates a safety-critical motor control IC combining three-phase PWM generation, current sensing, thermal protection, watchdog monitoring, and built-in safety diagnostics for industrial robots, conveyors, and machinery requiring certified safety performance.
design_collateral: three-phase PWM commutation logic with dead-time insertion
SIL-2 functional safety FMEA with failure mode mapping
diagnostic coverage analysis (DCA) report with >90% target
motor current sense signal conditioning circuits
thermal management strategy with temperature-dependent derating
safety-critical firmware scaffolding with double-monitor inputs
watchdog and reset sequencing for safe shutdown
isolated diagnostics interface for safety system integration
automation_coverage: six-step and sinusoidal PWM commutation patterns with dead-time verification
fault detection latency <10µs for under/over-current conditions
over-temperature detection with hysteresis and safe shutdown
diagnostic coverage >90% with safe failure modes verified
PWM cycle timing with <100ns jitter for multi-axis synchronization
watchdog timeout confidence testing with >99% coverage
reset sequence validation across all power states

chip_profiles.name: SAR ADC Macro
chip_profiles.summary: Converter-oriented chip scaffold centered on a reusable SAR ADC macro and digital control hooks.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable SAR ADC chip assembly with verification hooks baked in.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile packages the available SAR ADC macro and supporting control/VIP pieces into a reusable converter design scaffold.

chip_profiles.name: Secure IoT Gateway
chip_profiles.summary: Enterprise-grade IoT gateway with integrated crypto, multi-protocol wireless, and secure boot.
chip_profiles.headline: Production-ready secure IoT gateway for connected industrial and enterprise systems.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile combines multi-protocol wireless connectivity, strong cryptographic protection, secure boot infrastructure, and robust power management for enterprise IoT deployments requiring FIPS 140-2 level compliance.
chip_profiles.standard: BLE 5.0, MIPI I3C, AES-256, SHA-512, FIPS 140-2 Level 2

chip_profiles.name: Sigma-Delta ADC Macro
chip_profiles.summary: Oversampled converter scaffold centered on a reusable sigma-delta ADC macro and its control plane.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable sigma-delta converter chip assembly with integrated validation flow.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile packages the available sigma-delta ADC macro and the reusable digital control path for monitoring and sensing designs.

chip_profiles.name: Smart Battery Pack Controller
chip_profiles.summary: Multi-cell battery management system with wireless telemetry and active balancing.
chip_profiles.headline: Intelligent battery pack controller for electric vehicles and portable power systems.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles a complete battery management system from multi-cell voltage/current monitoring, active balancing, thermal management, wireless telemetry, and pack-level protection for automotive and industrial energy storage.

chip_profiles.name: Wireless-Powered Sensor Node
chip_profiles.summary: Battery-free or battery-assisted sensor node with Qi wireless charging and energy harvesting.
chip_profiles.headline: Sustainable IoT sensor node with wireless power and storage management.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile creates a low-power or battery-free sensor node combining wireless power receivers (Qi standard), energy harvesting, battery management, sensor interfaces, and wireless transmission for maintenance-free IoT deployments.
